title: A Loophole Brings Cystic Fibrosis Patients a ‘Miracle Drug’ in Generic Form
summary_full: A generic version of a breakthrough cystic fibrosis drug, manufactured in Bangladesh for a fraction of the American price, may give some families around the world an unlikely lifeline.
summary_public: A generic version of a breakthrough cystic fibrosis drug, manufactured in Bangladesh for a fraction of the American price, may give some families around the world an unlikely lifeline.
